# docx/malformed-table

- Source: hand-authored intentionally truncated WordprocessingML and JSON partial-result oracle, maintained in this repository.
- Producer: no Microsoft Office, LibreOffice, Google Workspace, or third-party document output was used.
- Redistribution: permitted; all content is repository-authored.
- Purpose: future structural table API coverage for warnings, incomplete-table marking, and retention of only fully closed rows at a malformed XML boundary.
- Sanitization: not applicable; the fixture was created from synthetic text and contains no private document content.
